scenarios.title: Medical Imaging and Segmentation Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Medical image transforms, nnU-Net planning/training/inference, MONAI bundles, TorchIO patch workflows, healthcare segmentation, and 3D image augmentation.
scenarios.role: Use nnU-Net v2 for medical image segmentation workflows: dataset preparation, planning/preprocessing, training, inference/evaluation, model sharing, and customization.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `nnunetv2` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: customization extension, data preparation, inference evaluation, planning preprocessing, and training configuration.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `nnunetv2` when the request names `nnunetv2`, centers on medical image segmentation workflows: dataset preparation, planning/preprocessing, training, inference/evaluation, model sharing, and customization, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in medical imaging and segmentation workflows. Then route to customization extension, data preparation, inference evaluation, or planning preprocessing when those focused workflows match.
